title: VegetaBhuna
description: A rich, crisp, indulgent Algerian vegetarian dish featuring a restaurant-style bhuna flavor profile with an emphasis on vegetables and spices.

ingredients.name: Tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Ripe, slightly crushed to release juices

ingredients.name: Onions
ingredients.notes: Halved and finely chopped for a crisp texture

ingredients.name: Bell Peppers
ingredients.notes: Cut into thin strips for even cooking

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mashed to add richness to the dish

ingredients.name: Curry Powder
ingredients.notes: To achieve a rich, aromatic bhuna taste

ingredients.name: Red Chili Flakes
ingredients.notes: Optional for more heat but less spicy than chili powder

instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add onions, bell peppers, and garlic to the hot oil. Sauté until they become translucent, around 10 minutes.
Toss in curry powder and chili flakes (if using). Stir for another minute to release flavors.
Increase heat to high and add tomatoes along with their juice. Simmer for about 20-30 minutes or until the sauce thickens slightly.
Once cooked, season with salt as per taste preference. Optionally garnish with fresh coriander before serving.
Serve hot over steamed basmati rice or naan bread.
